mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_warning (user_id, warn_type, proc_inst_id, node_key, node_name, end_date, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{warnType}, #{procInstId}, #{nodeKey}, #{nodeName}, #{endDate}, #{isRead}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_warning WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE task_warning SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
